description: Create the @quant/cross-app-gaming package with full implementation: types, game session service, universal leaderboard, cross-app hosting adapters, identity bridge, minor safety layer, and comprehensive tests.
steps: Create packages/cross-app-gaming/package.json following the pattern from packages/cross-app-workflows/package.json. Name: @quant/cross-app-gaming. Dependencies: zod ^3.23.0, @quant/common workspace:*. DevDeps: @types/node ^22, typescript ~5.5.0, vitest ^2.
Create packages/cross-app-gaming/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir:./dist, rootDir:./src, composite:true, references to ../common.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/types.ts with all interfaces and enums: AppContext ('chat_embed'|'feed_embed'|'fullscreen'|'meeting_icebreaker'|'random_match'), GameSessionState ('waiting'|'active'|'paused'|'finished'|'abandoned'), PlayerRole ('host'|'player'|'spectator'), IdentityMode ('anonymous'|'pseudonymous'|'revealed'|'friends_only'), AgeGroup ('under13'|'teen'|'adult'), LeaderboardScope ('global'|'friends'|'app_context'|'regional'), GameSession interface (id, gameId, appContext, state, host, players[], spectators[], maxPlayers, createdAt, config, stateData), Player interface (userId, displayName, identityMode, role, score, joinedAt, isMinor, ageGroup), LeaderboardEntry, Achievement, AntiCheatViolation, MinorSafetyConfig, HostingConfig, IdentityRevealConsent, etc.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/services/game-session.service.ts - GameSessionService class with: createSession(gameId, hostId, appContext, config), joinSession(sessionId, playerId, role), leaveSession(sessionId, playerId), updateGameState(sessionId, stateData), broadcastEvent(sessionId, event), pauseSession/resumeSession, getSession, listActiveSessions, destroySession. Uses in-memory Map for sessions. Validates maxPlayers, handles host migration on host leave, emits events.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/services/universal-leaderboard.service.ts - UniversalLeaderboardService class with: submitScore(gameId, playerId, score, appContext), getLeaderboard(gameId, scope, options), getPlayerRank(gameId, playerId), getAchievements(playerId), unlockAchievement(playerId, achievementId), getFriendComparison(playerId, gameId, friendIds[]), validateScore(gameId, playerId, score) for anti-cheat. In-memory storage with Map. Supports multiple scopes (global, friends, per-app-context).

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/services/cross-app-host.service.ts - CrossAppHostService class with: getHostingConfig(appContext) returning rendering constraints per context (dimensions, interaction model, audio), adaptGame(gameId, appContext) that returns adapted config, registerContextAdapter(appContext, adapter), getAvailableContexts(gameId). Each app context has different constraints: chat_embed (small inline widget, tap-only), feed_embed (card-sized, autoplay), fullscreen (no constraints), meeting_icebreaker (shared-screen, turn-based), random_match (split-screen, real-time).

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/services/identity-bridge.service.ts - IdentityBridgeService class with: createAnonymousIdentity(userId) for QuantMax random mode, revealIdentity(fromUserId, toUserId, consent) consent-to-reveal flow, getDisplayIdentity(userId, viewerUserId, context) returns appropriate identity based on relationship/mode, linkCrossAppSession(userId, sessionId, appContext) tracks same user across app contexts, getPlayerHistory(userId) unified play history.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/services/minor-safety.service.ts - MinorSafetyService class with: checkGameAccess(playerId, gameId, ageGroup) enforces age gates, getCommunicationLimits(ageGroup) returns what comms are allowed (no voice/video for under13, text-only with filtering for teens), validatePurchase(playerId, ageGroup, amount) blocks real-money for minors, getParentalVisibility(parentId, childId) returns child's gaming activity, flagInappropriateContent(sessionId, reporterId, contentType). Config-driven restrictions.
Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/index.ts barrel export - export all services and types following the pattern from packages/realtime/src/index.ts.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/__tests__/game-session.test.ts - comprehensive tests for GameSessionService: create session, join/leave, max players enforcement, host migration, spectator mode, state updates, broadcasting, pause/resume, destroy.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/__tests__/universal-leaderboard.test.ts - tests for UniversalLeaderboardService: submit scores, get leaderboard sorted correctly, rank calculation, friend comparison, achievement unlock (idempotent), anti-cheat validation rejects impossible scores.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/__tests__/cross-app-host.test.ts - tests for CrossAppHostService: each app context returns correct constraints, adaptGame applies constraints, unknown context throws.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/__tests__/identity-bridge.test.ts - tests for IdentityBridgeService: anonymous identity hides real info, reveal requires mutual consent, display identity varies by context, cross-app session linking.

Create packages/cross-app-gaming/src/__tests__/minor-safety.test.ts - tests for MinorSafetyService: under13 blocked from real-money, teen restricted from voice chat with strangers, adult unrestricted, parental visibility returns activity, inappropriate content flagging.
Run pnpm install from repo root to register the new package, then run typecheck and tests to ensure everything passes.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming passes with no errors
UniversalLeaderboardService provides cross-app scoring with friend comparison and anti-cheat
CrossAppHostService adapts games to 5 distinct app contexts with appropriate constraints
IdentityBridgeService implements anonymous-then-consent-reveal flow for QuantMax random
MinorSafetyService enforces age-appropriate restrictions: no real-money for minors, communication limits, parental visibility
All services use constructor injection with config objects
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm lint --filter=@quant/cross-app-gaming
findings: Review fixes applied: (1) AnonymousIdentity no longer leaks realUserId - split into PublicAnonymousIdentity returned to callers and internal mapping. (2) checkGameAccess now uses content ratings (everyone/teen/mature) to block age-inappropriate games. (3) Regional leaderboard filter now correctly matches entry.region against options.region. (4) Added revokeConsent() method that sets revoked=true, causing getDisplayIdentity to return anonymous. (5) Added cleanupAbandonedSessions(maxAgeMs) to remove stale abandoned sessions. (6) Added registerGameContexts() so getAvailableContexts returns only supported contexts. All 88 tests pass (up from 72). Typecheck passes.
